red_test: go test ./internal/atlas -run 'TestRecommendationReconciliationSchemaRequiresStaleRouteDecisionStatus|TestMissionRecommendationsImportPersistsLeaseStartAndResumeUsesIt|TestMissionRecommendationsDetectStaleClosureArtifacts' -count=1 failed before implementation because AtlasRecommendationReconciliationPacket had no stale_route_decision_status field.
summary: Regression coverage now proves the reconciliation schema requires stale_route_decision_status and stale reconciliation packets are rejected when the route decision drifts from the root readback.
